question: Observation
answer: In a cloudy noon, a man was running on the bicycle road beside the cliff. He was wearing a red t-shirt, a black short, and air pots. Behind him were two palm trees. He was in a jogging posture with his hair was all blown to the back. On his face, he was looking straightforward.

question: Interpretation
answer: I define this as Passion since even there was only him who was jogging, but he keep jogging and I can see the firm eyes and restless soul.

question: Connection
answer:
The article I used: "A Rational Checklist is no Match for Emotions in Matters of the Heart" By Karen Wu
Main concept: Attraction, desire, and excitement can make people forget or ignore their original standards.
Connection: Even the article is talking about passion to partners, but I think there is connection to this man passion to jogging. By guessing, maybe the goal for the man to do jogging was because he wanted to be more attractive, loss weight, or some other reason. However, in this moment, his passion or his excitement make him looks like he really loves jogging, and forget his original goal.

question: Hotspots
answer: Hotspot 1: His eyes were very firm when he looks forward. Hotspot 2: He put on earphone shows that he wants to focus on jogging.
